task:
/home/user/Documents/annual_review.pptx is open in LibreOffice Impress — a 5-slide deck with titles 'Annual Review 2025', 'Financial Summary', 'Team Growth', 'Product Milestones', 'Goals for 2026'.

Make the following changes:

1. On Slide 2 ('Financial Summary'), append a new bullet 'Net profit margin: 18%' at the end of the existing content.
2. On Slide 5 ('Goals for 2026'), add speaker notes 'Set quarterly check-in meetings to track progress.'
3. Save a copy of the edited presentation in ODF Presentation (.odp) format at /home/user/Documents/annual_review.odp.

The original /home/user/Documents/annual_review.pptx must still exist on disk after the save. The deck must still have exactly 5 slides.

verification.command: check-notes-contain 4 "Set quarterly check-in meetings to track progress"

verification.description: ODP file exists at expected path
